p.boldface: Application for Extension of Study Leave without Pay.

text.p: I am writing to apply for six months Study Leave without pay from January 28th 2008. This leave will afford me the opportunity to complete my Master of Theological Studies degree program at Divinity School, which I have already begun since September 11, 2006. I will also need up to additional six months to do my Optional Practical Training (OPT) after my graduation.

I am a lecturer grade II in the Department of Religious Studies. My area of Research and Teaching is in Philosophy of Religion with keen interest in Comparative perspective in the study of Religion. I am also on the Post Graduate program of the University, .

I promise to return to the Department at the end of my Studies here in Divinity School, to be able to contribute my own quota to knowledge in the University in general and the Department of Religious Studies in particular.
A supporting letter from the Registrar of Divinity School is attached.
I will be very grateful if my application is given a favorable consideration.
